stdout:
Table	Create Table
incidents	CREATE TABLE `incidents` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `uid` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `execution_id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `project_id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(500) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `description` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `severity` enum('CRITICAL','MAJOR','MINOR','INFO') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'INFO',
  `step_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `expected_result` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `actual_result` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `detected_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `incidents_uid_unique` (`uid`),
  KEY `idx_inc_execution` (`execution_id`),
  KEY `idx_inc_project` (`project_id`),
  KEY `idx_inc_severity` (`severity`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
